item.title: Digging Foundations (Farmhouse Day 1)
item.description: Day one of the farmhouse build begins with digging foundations — the critical step that sets the stage for everything to come. Watch as the groundwork takes shape for a dream home.

media:content.media:title: Digging Foundations (Farmhouse Day 1)
media:content.media:description: Day one of the farmhouse build begins with digging foundations — the critical step that sets the stage for everything to come. Watch as the groundwork takes shape for a dream home.

item.description: Friendly competition meets craftsmanship. Who came out on top when the tools turned into trophies?

media:content.media:description: Friendly competition meets craftsmanship. Who came out on top when the tools turned into trophies?

item.title: Your Builder Fears — We Name Them All!
item.description: Every builder has fears — from hidden cracks to costly mistakes. This video lays them all out, exposing the challenges and worries that come with construction.

media:content.media:title: Your Builder Fears — We Name Them All!
media:content.media:description: Every builder has fears — from hidden cracks to costly mistakes. This video lays them all out, exposing the challenges and worries that come with construction.

item.title: Easy & Effective Method to Strong Stair Building
item.description: Strong stairs don’t just happen — they’re built with the right method. This clip shows a simple yet effective approach to stair construction that ensures safety and durability.

media:content.media:title: Easy & Effective Method to Strong Stair Building
media:content.media:description: Strong stairs don’t just happen — they’re built with the right method. This clip shows a simple yet effective approach to stair construction that ensures safety and durability.

item.title: Building a Property on a $100,000 Budget!
item.description: Stretching every dollar to make a dream real. How far can a tight budget go when building from the ground up?

item.title: Overhang Outriggers for Home Sophistication

item.title: A centuries-old home gets a stunning makeover

item.title: Why the Batting Is So Important | Mountain Cabin
item.description: Insulation batting is more than filler—it’s essential. Why does it matter so much in a mountain cabin build?
